concepts.name: Tree
concepts.short_definition: A hierarchical data structure consisting of nodes connected by edges.

concepts.name: Node
concepts.short_definition: A fundamental unit of a tree, containing data and references to other nodes.

concepts.name: Edge
concepts.short_definition: A connection between two nodes in a tree.

concepts.name: Root
concepts.short_definition: The topmost node in a tree, with no parent.

concepts.name: Parent Node
concepts.short_definition: A node that has one or more child nodes.

concepts.name: Child Node
concepts.short_definition: A node that is directly connected to a parent node.

concepts.name: Leaf Node
concepts.short_definition: A node with no child nodes.

concepts.name: Internal Node
concepts.short_definition: A node that has at least one child node.

concepts.name: Siblings
concepts.short_definition: Nodes that share the same parent node.

concepts.name: Depth
concepts.short_definition: The number of edges from the root to a node.

concepts.name: Height
concepts.short_definition: The maximum depth of any node in the tree.

concepts.name: Level
concepts.short_definition: The depth of a node, often starting from 0 at the root.

concepts.name: Path
concepts.short_definition: A sequence of nodes connected by edges from one node to another.

concepts.name: Subtree
concepts.short_definition: A tree formed by a node and all its descendants.

concepts.name: Degree of a Node
concepts.short_definition: The number of edges connected to a node.

concepts.name: Tree Traversal
concepts.short_definition: The process of visiting each node in a tree in a systematic way.

concepts.name: Binary Tree
concepts.short_definition: A tree where each node has at most two children, referred to as left and right children.

concepts.name: Full Binary Tree
concepts.short_definition: A binary tree where every node has either 0 or 2 children.

concepts.name: Complete Binary Tree
concepts.short_definition: A binary tree in which all levels are completely filled except possibly the last level, which is filled from left to right.

concepts.name: Perfect Binary Tree
concepts.short_definition: A binary tree in which all interior nodes have two children and all leaves are at the same depth.

concepts.name: Balanced Binary Tree
concepts.short_definition: A binary tree where the height difference between the left and right subtrees of any node is not more than one.

concepts.name: Binary Search Tree
concepts.short_definition: A binary tree where for each node, all values in its left subtree are less than the node's value, and all values in its right subtree are greater.

concepts.name: N-ary Tree
concepts.short_definition: A tree where each node can have any number of children.

concepts.name: Forest
concepts.short_definition: A collection of disjoint trees.

concepts.name: Directed Tree
concepts.short_definition: A tree where edges have a direction, typically from parent to child.

concepts.name: Undirected Tree
concepts.short_definition: A tree where edges do not have a direction.

concepts.name: Rooted Tree
concepts.short_definition: A tree with a designated root node.

concepts.name: Ordered Tree
concepts.short_definition: A rooted tree where the order of children for each node matters.

concepts.name: Unordered Tree
concepts.short_definition: A rooted tree where the order of children for each node does not matter.

concepts.name: Ancestor
concepts.short_definition: A node that is on the path from the root to a given node (excluding the node itself).

concepts.name: Descendant
concepts.short_definition: A node that is on a path starting from a given node (excluding the node itself).

concepts.name: Degree of a Tree
concepts.short_definition: The maximum degree of any node in the tree.

concepts.name: Tree Properties
concepts.short_definition: Fundamental characteristics that define a tree structure.

concepts.name: Graph Theory
concepts.short_definition: The mathematical study of graphs, of which trees are a specific type.

concepts.name: Acyclic Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph that contains no cycles.

concepts.name: Connected Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where there is a path between any two nodes.

concepts.name: Tree Isomorphism
concepts.short_definition: The concept of two trees having the same structure.

concepts.name: Tree Representation
concepts.short_definition: Ways to store and implement tree data structures in memory.

concepts.name: Adjacency List
concepts.short_definition: A common way to represent graphs and trees, where each node has a list of its adjacent nodes.

concepts.name: Adjacency Matrix
concepts.short_definition: Another method to represent graphs and trees using a matrix.
